_about: Measurements for /classes/language-models-from-scratch. Every number was produced on this machine: an NVIDIA H100 80GB HBM3 (132 SMs, PyTorch 2.7.0, CUDA 12.8) for the GPU results, and the same host CPU for the tokenizer results. Peak bf16 throughput used as the MFU denominator is 729 TFLOP/s, from classes/data/h100.json.

chinese.text: 人工智能是计算机科学的分支
